item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Juicy pork meatballs served with steamedorganic potatoes, brown gravy, and jelly. (1+2+6+13)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Aromatic Mexican mole with fresh herbs andtender chicken, served with roasted spiced potatoes, charred corn-bean salad,and chili sauce on the side. (2+11+15) GREEN DISH: Aromatic Mexican mole with freshherbs, served with plant-based protein, roasted spiced potatoes, charredcorn-bean salad, and chili sauce on the side. (2+11+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Roasted lambbreast with warm spices, served with bulgur salad, lightly pickled cabbage andred onion, za'tar, and sumac. GREEN DISH: Tofumarinated in warm spices and pan-fried, served with bulgur salad, lightlypickled cabbage and red onion, za'tar, and sumac.

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Larb moo –Autentisk thailandsk ret med saftigt svinekød, friske krydderurter og enafbalanceret dressing. Serveret med jasminris. GREEN DISH: Tofu marineret i soya og lime med friske urter. Serveret med jasminris.

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Spicy Spanishalbondigas made with beef in aromatic tomato sauce, served with al dentespaghetti, topped with grated Parmesan and fresh basil. (1+2+6+13) GREEN DISH: GREEN DISH: Spanish vegetarian meatballs in aromatic tomato sauce, servedwith al dente spaghetti, topped with grated cheese and fresh basil. (1+2+6+13)
